ValidationRule.description: The Billing Template Checkboxes must match
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true,
OR( AND( ShowPositionAmount__c=true, ShowPosition__c=false ),
AND( ShowInvoiceText__c=true, ShowPosition__c=false ) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Checkboxes are not in line for billing template. (PA009)
